title: ShowItem
description: Announce in chat what item a player is holding!
body: # ShowItem ShowItem is a simple plugin for [Paper](http://www.papermc.io) servers running Minecraft 1.19 or later. It allows your players to display what item they are currently holding in chat using a command. ## Features * [MiniMessage](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/format.html) support. * Legacy Color Code support. * Commands for both items in hand and worn armor. ![](https://i.imgur.com/zAnRUfg.png) ## Requirements * Java 17 or newer * Server Software with Paper API. * Minecraft 1.19 or later * PlaceholderAPI ## Commands | Command | Description | Aliases | |-----------------|--------------------------------------------|------------| | /showitem | Main admin command. | /showhand | | /showhelmet | Reload the plugin's configuration files. | /showhat | | /showchestplate | Reset a player's password. | /showshirt | | /showleggings | Allows a player to register to the server. | /showpants | | /showboots | Allows a player to login to the server. | /showshoes | ## Permissions | Permission | Description | |-------------------------|---------------------------------------------| | showitem.use | Allows the player to use ShowItem commands. | ## Support All support should be done through the issues section on GitHub. ## bStats
